primitives.name: Signal Field
primitives.customerUse: Shows that the app is alive and reactive before any media pipeline runs.
primitives.futureAdapterMapping: Map gateway heartbeat and availability telemetry into visual field behavior.

primitives.name: Pulse Core
primitives.customerUse: Shows decisive state changes such as job accepted, output ready, or approval pending.
primitives.futureAdapterMapping: Map job and payment-ticket state into pulse events after live gateway proof.

primitives.name: Braid Lattice
primitives.customerUse: Composes multiple visual streams for comparison or layered creative direction.
primitives.futureAdapterMapping: Map candidate pipelines, sinks, or style branches into lattice strands.

primitives.name: Focus Lens
primitives.customerUse: Creates a calmer review state for operator approval and QA.
primitives.futureAdapterMapping: Map QA pass or fail, reviewer notes, and claim limits into review state.

primitives.name: Palette Drift
primitives.customerUse: Turns creative intent changes into visible palette shifts.
primitives.futureAdapterMapping: Map model, capability, or output classification into palette selection.

primitives.name: Latency Tide
primitives.customerUse: Makes runtime performance legible through tempo and density.
primitives.futureAdapterMapping: Map measured gateway latency and timeout state into visible tempo changes.

primitives.name: Review Gate
primitives.customerUse: Marks when an app is waiting for evidence or owner approval before promotion.
primitives.futureAdapterMapping: Map funded-job approval, accounting receipt, and output evidence into gate state.

primitives.name: Motion Mask
primitives.customerUse: Turns movement intent into a mask-like control signal for browser effects.
primitives.futureAdapterMapping: Map frame-difference or segmentation output into mask density.

primitives.name: Style Transfer Plane
primitives.customerUse: Provides the browser-side control plane for future live video-to-video style transforms.
primitives.futureAdapterMapping: Replace local shader controls with gateway job parameters after proof.
